expectations.text: Report follows boost template (P-XXX IDs, Executive Summary, Source section)
expectations.evidence: Full boost report with Source section, Executive Summary, P-001 through P-010, Cross-Cutting Observations, Not Recommended
Accurately covers SDK features: hooks (PreToolUse/PostToolUse), AgentDefinition, MCP tools, SandboxSettings, permission modes, max_turns

expectations.text: Proposals reference specific skills and file paths
expectations.evidence: Every proposal has specific target skills and files, e.g. P-002: 'references/error-resilience.md, references/grind-error-resilience.md'

expectations.text: Proposals are actionable with concrete changes
expectations.evidence: P-002 includes detailed error hierarchy tree, P-005 has JSON schema for session metadata, P-007 has agent-roles.md example structure
All 5 experts present with consensus notes per proposal (e.g. 'Workflow Architect(주도), Quality Guardian(강력 지지)')

expectations.text: Includes Not Recommended section with rejected ideas
expectations.evidence: 4 rejected ideas: stateless query, bidirectional client, plugin system, ThinkingConfig control — each with clear reasoning
